scenario: Recover a cloud CI failure caused by an unstable generated artifact and missing deterministic ordering checks.

tasks.title: Reproduce CI failure locally
tasks.details: Run pytest and py_compile to capture exact failure output without invoking external services.

tasks.title: Identify nondeterministic artifact ordering
tasks.details: Compare generated JSON order against committed artifact and locate unordered dictionary/list construction.

tasks.title: Patch stable serialization path
tasks.details: Sort trace rows and aggregate keys before writing artifact.

tasks.title: Regenerate benchmark artifact
tasks.details: Run benchmark generation after tests pass so CI diffs are reviewable.

decisions: Treat CI artifact drift as an operational continuity failure, not as a flaky test exception.
Use deterministic serialization and stable trace ordering instead of timestamps.
Keep the benchmark offline so pull requests remain reproducible.
constraints: No network access is required for CI replay validation.
No wall clock timestamps may appear in artifact rows.
All metrics must be mathematically recomputable from original and replayed fields.
Failure recovery must be represented explicitly in replay state.
failures: CI reported a deterministic artifact mismatch.
Trace rows were emitted in filesystem discovery order instead of benchmark-defined order.
recoveries: Define TRACE_SPECS as an explicit tuple for ordering.
Serialize artifacts with sort_keys=True and an ending newline.
Add a stable ordering test for trace names.

architecture_references.role: source of stable benchmark row ordering

deployment_requirements: CI must run without service credentials.
Generated artifact must not include host-specific paths.
Tests must validate fixed precision and metric bounds.
unresolved_blockers: Full-suite runtime may expose unrelated tests outside this focused benchmark.
Artifact consumers must switch to the new benchmark name before depending on it.

dependencies.detail: Patch depends on locating unstable ordering source.
Artifact regeneration depends on stable serialization patch.

transcript_noise: Discussion about local shell themes, terminal dimensions, and previous branch names is intentionally excluded from operational replay fields.
